description: Evaluation cases for NLM Slides skill including revision flow

test_cases.name: Workshop slides - auto detect
test_cases.input: Genera diapositivas para un taller de introduccion a Docker
assertions: Selects detailed_deck with speaker notes emphasis
Focus includes exercise and checkpoint slides

test_cases.name: Keynote slides - presenter format
test_cases.input: I need clean slides for my conference talk about AI in healthcare
assertions: Selects presenter_slides for clean visual style

test_cases.name: Executive deck - short format
test_cases.input: Prepara una presentacion corta para la junta directiva sobre migrar a la nube
assertions: Selects short length for time-constrained audience

test_cases.name: Training deck with existing notebook
assertions: Focus includes learning objectives and comprehension checks

test_cases.name: Technical deck - architecture review
test_cases.input: Necesito slides para la review de arquitectura del sistema de pagos
assertions: Focus includes diagrams, trade-offs, implementation plan

test_cases.name: Revision flow - post-generation improvement
assertions: Retrieves current deck metadata from studio_status
Waits for user approval before executing studio_revise
Informs user that original is preserved

test_cases.name: Export as PPTX
assertions: Offers alternative PDF format if PPTX fails

test_cases.name: Forced detailed format override
test_cases.input: /nlm:slides:detailed sobre microservicios para equipo de devops
assertions: Skips format selection — uses detailed_deck directly
Still runs length detection from context

test_cases.name: False positive rejection
test_cases.input: The presentation layer handles the slide panel component

test_cases.name: Revision with specific slide instructions
test_cases.input: Revisa el deck: slide 1 necesita mejor titulo, slide 5 esta muy cargada, slide 8 necesita call to action
assertions: Maps user language to precise instructions
Executes studio_revise with structured slide_instructions array
Polls for new artifact after revision
